title: Unmapped regions (legend-strip value chips)
description: Reference list of ECI state/UT codes whose polygon area at the default IndicatorChoropleth zoom is too small to communicate a legend bucket (Lakshadweep, Andaman & Nicobar, etc.). The choropleth still renders the polygon in maplibre at true coordinates; this list surfaces an additional value chip on the legend strip so the citizen can read the indicator bucket for these UTs. Hand-curated taxonomy; extending the list is additive (minor bump). See ADR-0029 and docs/concepts/unmapped-regions.md.

x-changelog.description: Initial schema. List of {entity_id, display_name} pairs. Hand-authored — `sources: []` per CLAUDE.md §12 (the list itself is editorial; the population values shown in the chip come from datasets/indicators/in/demography/state_population_lakhs.json which carries its own sources).

sources.description: Per CLAUDE.md §12 / ADR-0002. For this file the canonical shape is `[]` (hand-authored) — the readability decision is editorial, not derived from any single publisher.

regions.description: Open list. Adding a region is additive. Removing one is a major bump only if a downstream consumer hard-references the entity_id; otherwise minor.

entity_id.description: ECI state/UT code (S__ for states, U__ for UTs). Must match a key in frontend/src/lib/maplibre/sources.ts STATE_NAME_TO_ECI.

display_name.description: Citizen-facing label shown on the chip. Use the publisher's preferred form (e.g. 'Andaman & Nicobar', not 'A&N Islands').

notes.description: Maintainer notes (why this UT is listed, follow-up TODOs).
